1.name: Time Attunement
1.description: Sense the passage of time exactly as well as any temporal distortions.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 43
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 32-33

1.name: Time Sense
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 74

1.name: Hourglass of the Mind
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 171

2.name: Internal Recursion
2.description: Cause a target to repeat a set of actions over and over.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 44
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 33-34

2.name: Ramble On
2.description: Cause a target to unknowingly repeat a simple action.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 74

2.name: Recurring Contemplation
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 171

3.name: Lapse
3.description: Cause a target to move slower in time.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 44
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 34-35

3.name: Zombie's Curse
3.description: Cause a target to experience time at half-speed.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 75

3.name: Leaden Movement
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 171

4.name: Cowalker
4.description: Stop time for a moment in order to appear in two places at once.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 75

4.name: Subjective Suspension
4.description: Temporarily suspend an object outside of time.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 45
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 35-36

4.name: Patience of the Norns
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 172

5.name: Clotho's Gift
5.description: Accelerate your time frame in order to take several actions a round.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 45

5.name: Frozen Object
5.description: Stop time for an inanimate object.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 75

6.name: Control Aging
6.description: Slow down or speed up the process of aging.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 76

6.name: Kiss of Lachesis
6.description: Change the legal age of a target.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 46

6.name: Insight
6.description: Step forward in time to see how your next actions are going to turn out.
references: Lore of the Bloodlines Pg. 101

7.name: Cheat the Fates
7.description: Reflexively step outside of time for several rounds.
references: Players Guide to High Clans Pg. 174

7.name: Domain of Evernight
7.description: Dilate time so that day passes in a blink of an eye.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 76

7.name: Hall of Hades' Court
7.description: Alter the flow of time in an area, making hours pass as minutes or minutes as hours.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 47
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 39

7.name: Outside the Hourglass
7.description: Step fully outside of the time stream.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 77

8.name: Clio's Kiss
8.description: Bring something or someone from the past into the present.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 47

8.name: Pocket Out of Time
8.description: Shift an entire area outside of time.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 77

8.name: Rewind
8.description: Observe past events that happened in the area you are standing in.
references: Lore of the Bloodlines Pg. 101

8.name: Rewind Time
8.description: Move up to a day backwards in time.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 77

8.name: Temporal Understanding
8.description: Step forward in time to see the long term consequences of your actions.
references: Lore of the Bloodlines Pg. 101

9.name: Summon History
9.description: Bring a particular time into the present.
references: Dirty Secrets of the Black Hand Pg. 77

9.name: Tangle Atropos' Hand
9.description: Go back in time a few rounds at great mental cost.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 48

10.name: Plot Device
references: Gehenna Pg. 182
